Exit load, stamp duty and tax
Exit load
Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.
Stamp duty on investment:
0.005% (from July 1st, 2020)
from July 1st 2020
Tax implication
If you redeem within two years, returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab. If you redeem after two years, returns are taxed at 12.5%.

About
HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth
HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is a Commodities Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Arun Agarwal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,34,238 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 02 Jul 2026 is ₹37.42.
The HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.
;
Investment Objective
The scheme is seek to capital appreciation by investing in units of HDFC Silver ETF (HSETF).
Fund benchmark
Domestic Price of Silver
